component.name: Faker
component.summary: PHP library that generates fake data

description.p: Faker is a PHP library that generates fake data for you. Whether you need to bootstrap your database, create good-looking XML documents, fill-in your persistence to stress test it, or anonymise data taken from a production service, Faker is for you.

It is heavily inspired by Perl's Data::Faker and Ruby's Faker. Faker supports many locales and can generate names, addresses, phone numbers, lorem text, dates, internet data, barcodes, colours, and much more.
